title: Squirrel Removal in Ditmas Park, Brooklyn | $900-$2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Ditmas Park, Brooklyn. Humane extraction, entry point sealing & attic cleanup. Licensed experts. Call for fast service!
intro: Ditmas Park's beautiful Victorian and Craftsman-style homes provide the perfect environment for squirrels seeking shelter in attics and eaves. Our specialized squirrel removal services protect your historic property from damage caused by these persistent rodents. Best Pest Control NYC offers humane, effective solutions tailored to Ditmas Park's unique architectural needs.
whyUs: With over 15 years serving Ditmas Park's diverse housing stock, we understand the specific challenges posed by squirrels in both vintage homes and modern apartments. Our licensed technicians use humane removal methods and provide comprehensive exclusion services to keep your property squirrel-free year-round.
localContext: Ditmas Park's tree-lined streets and proximity to Prospect Park South make it prime squirrel habitat, with these agile creatures frequently accessing homes through overhanging branches near Cortelyou Road and surrounding blocks. The neighborhood's historic homes with wood siding and decorative trim require specialized attention to prevent squirrel entry without compromising architectural integrity.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Ditmas Park?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal services in Ditmas Park typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and required repairs. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work, and sanitization of affected areas. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning work.

faqs.question: Are squirrels common in Ditmas Park homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels are very common in Ditmas Park due to the neighborhood's mature trees and proximity to parks. The area's older homes with wood construction and architectural details provide numerous entry points. Squirrels typically invade attics in fall and spring when seeking nesting sites.

faqs.question: How do you remove squirrels humanely?
faqs.answer: We use live traps and one-way exclusion doors that allow squirrels to exit but not re-enter your home. Once all squirrels are removed, we seal entry points with durable materials and provide attic cleanup to remove nesting materials and droppings. All methods comply with NYC wildlife regulations and prioritize animal welfare.

faqs.question: Can squirrels damage my Ditmas Park home?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Squirrels can cause significant damage by chewing through wood, insulation, and electrical wiring, creating fire hazards. They contaminate attics with urine and feces, and their constant gnawing can compromise the structural integrity of historic homes. Prompt removal prevents costly repairs and protects your property's value.
